title: DFU - Low Battery - Checking DFU pop up if at least one earbud is at low battery
scenario: DFU blocked with low battery pop-up when either earbud is below 5% charge on Device Settings > Software Update screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Ensure that at least one earbud (left, right, or both) has a battery level below 5%.
5. Attempt to initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU).
6. Observe the pop-up message displayed on the screen.
7. Tap OK on the pop-up message.
expected: A pop-up message appears: "Update currently not available, please try back later". After tapping OK, the user is returned to the Device Settings > Software Update screen.
